actions.action: Recover or explicitly document exclusion for zero-recording/zero-matched patients.
actions.exit_criterion: Each P0 patient has recovered wearable segments or an advisor-approved exclusion record, and rerun MSG triage has zero p0_blocker rows.

actions.action: Stop full-cohort wording until official split/count/source coverage is complete.
actions.evidence: Blockers: gate_b_not_passed, gate_c_not_passed, patients_below_full_cohort_threshold, events_below_full_cohort_threshold, official_split_manifest_not_clean.
actions.exit_criterion: SeizeIT2 readiness rerun reports Gate B/Gate C passed, expected counts verified, official splits clean, and no P0 cohort blockers.

actions.action: Do not freeze splits or citable rows until Gate B checklist items are closed.
actions.evidence: MSG blockers=3 P0 patients; SeizeIT2 blockers=20.
actions.exit_criterion: Gate B audit log is complete, guardrails rerun cleanly, and Gate C dry-run reports ready_for_gate_c_review.

actions.action: Resolve unmatched events or lock a matched-event-only denominator policy.
actions.exit_criterion: All unmatched events have source-review decisions and every leaderboard row declares source, matched, and prediction-coverable denominators.

actions.action: Demote failing SPH/SOP horizons or document them as feasibility-negative analyses.
actions.evidence: Horizons: SPH5/SOP1440, SPH60/SOP1440, SPH60/SOP360, SPH5/SOP30, SPH60/SOP30; min_valid_window_fraction=0.160; min_event_coverable_fraction=0.230.
actions.exit_criterion: Main-paper horizon choice is advisor-approved and any failing horizons are excluded from main claims or labeled as negative feasibility findings.

actions.action: Complete required split/task/modality readiness rows before benchmark claims.
actions.evidence: Blockers: patients_expected_count_not_provided, recordings_expected_count_not_provided, events_expected_count_not_provided, required_splits_missing, required_tasks_missing, required_modality_tracks_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, required_ready_track_missing, ... (15 total).
actions.exit_criterion: All required split/task/modality combinations have ready track rows.

actions.action: Keep source-review-required horizons out of citable tables until event gaps close.
actions.exit_criterion: Rerun horizon triage has no source_review_required rows for chosen main horizons.

actions.action: Preserve non-ready track rows as explicit negative readiness findings.
actions.exit_criterion: Paper tables and text disclose non-ready tracks instead of hiding them.
